description: Adobe Premiere Pro style transitions mapped to FFmpeg xfade transition codes

transitions.name: Cross Dissolve
transitions.description: Standard opacity crossfade between clips - most common transition

transitions.name: Dip to Black
transitions.description: Fade through black (clip 1 -> black -> clip 2)

transitions.name: Dip to White
transitions.description: Fade through white (clip 1 -> white -> clip 2)

transitions.name: Film Dissolve
transitions.description: Alternative dissolve with slightly different blending curve

transitions.name: Fast Fade
transitions.description: Quick 0.5 second dissolve for rapid pacing

transitions.name: Slow Fade
transitions.description: Extended slow dissolve for emotional/dramatic moments

transitions.name: Fade to Gray
transitions.description: Desaturate to grayscale during transition

transitions.name: Wipe Left
transitions.description: Clip 2 wipes in from right to left (revealing left)

transitions.name: Wipe Right
transitions.description: Clip 2 wipes in from left to right (revealing right)

transitions.name: Wipe Up
transitions.description: Clip 2 wipes in from bottom to top

transitions.name: Wipe Down
transitions.description: Clip 2 wipes in from top to bottom

transitions.name: Wipe Top-Left
transitions.description: Diagonal wipe from bottom-right to top-left

transitions.name: Wipe Top-Right
transitions.description: Diagonal wipe from bottom-left to top-right

transitions.name: Wipe Bottom-Left
transitions.description: Diagonal wipe from top-right to bottom-left

transitions.name: Wipe Bottom-Right
transitions.description: Diagonal wipe from top-left to bottom-right

transitions.name: Diagonal Wipe TL-BR
transitions.description: Corner-to-corner wipe: top-left to bottom-right

transitions.name: Diagonal Wipe TR-BL
transitions.description: Corner-to-corner wipe: top-right to bottom-left

transitions.name: Diagonal Wipe BL-TR
transitions.description: Corner-to-corner wipe: bottom-left to top-right

transitions.name: Diagonal Wipe BR-TL
transitions.description: Corner-to-corner wipe: bottom-right to top-left

transitions.name: Push Left
transitions.description: Clip 1 slides out left while clip 2 enters from right

transitions.name: Push Right
transitions.description: Clip 1 slides out right while clip 2 enters from left

transitions.name: Push Up
transitions.description: Clip 1 slides up while clip 2 enters from bottom

transitions.name: Push Down
transitions.description: Clip 1 slides down while clip 2 enters from top

transitions.name: Cover Left
transitions.description: Clip 2 slides over clip 1 from right to left

transitions.name: Cover Right
transitions.description: Clip 2 slides over clip 1 from left to right

transitions.name: Cover Up
transitions.description: Clip 2 slides over clip 1 from bottom to top

transitions.name: Cover Down
transitions.description: Clip 2 slides over clip 1 from top to bottom

transitions.name: Reveal Left
transitions.description: Clip 1 moves left revealing clip 2 underneath

transitions.name: Reveal Right
transitions.description: Clip 1 moves right revealing clip 2 underneath

transitions.name: Reveal Up
transitions.description: Clip 1 moves up revealing clip 2 underneath

transitions.name: Reveal Down
transitions.description: Clip 1 moves down revealing clip 2 underneath

transitions.name: Iris Open
transitions.description: Expanding circular iris reveals clip 2 from center

transitions.name: Iris Close
transitions.description: Shrinking circular iris to clip 2 at center

transitions.name: Iris Round
transitions.description: Circular mask transition (hard edge iris)

transitions.name: Radial Wipe
transitions.description: Clockwise radial wipe from center outward

transitions.name: Smooth Left
transitions.description: Soft-edged gradient wipe from right to left

transitions.name: Smooth Right
transitions.description: Soft-edged gradient wipe from left to right

transitions.name: Smooth Up
transitions.description: Soft-edged gradient wipe from bottom to top

transitions.name: Smooth Down
transitions.description: Soft-edged gradient wipe from top to bottom

transitions.name: Horizontal Slice Left
transitions.description: Horizontal split with left side moving

transitions.name: Horizontal Slice Right
transitions.description: Horizontal split with right side moving

transitions.name: Vertical Slice Up
transitions.description: Vertical split with upper portion moving

transitions.name: Vertical Slice Down
transitions.description: Vertical split with lower portion moving

transitions.name: Horizontal Blur
transitions.description: Directional motion blur during transition

transitions.name: Pixelate
transitions.description: Blocky pixelation dissolve effect

transitions.name: Zoom In
transitions.description: Clip 2 zooms in from center to full frame

transitions.name: Squeeze Horizontal
transitions.description: Horizontal compression then expansion

transitions.name: Squeeze Vertical
transitions.description: Vertical compression then expansion

transitions.name: Split Open Vertical
transitions.description: Vertical split opening from center outward

transitions.name: Split Close Vertical
transitions.description: Vertical split closing to center

transitions.name: Split Open Horizontal
transitions.description: Horizontal split opening from center outward

transitions.name: Split Close Horizontal
transitions.description: Horizontal split closing to center

transitions.name: Wind Left
transitions.description: Horizontal motion blur smear to left

transitions.name: Wind Right
transitions.description: Horizontal motion blur smear to right

transitions.name: Wind Up
transitions.description: Vertical motion blur smear upward

transitions.name: Wind Down
transitions.description: Vertical motion blur smear downward

transitions.name: Distance Fade
transitions.description: Depth-based fade with slight blur

transitions.name: Rectangular Crop
transitions.description: Rectangle mask transition effect
